problem: Pilot reports during downwind, ailerons became unresponsive and swayed to the left despite student putting in right aileron. This happened twice and then became normal again in the rest of the pattern. Post flight we did not find anything wrong with the ailerons.
action: Attempted to duplicate, could not duplicate. Visually inspected ailerons, aileron static wicks, aileron control cables and aileron control cable pulleys under rear passenger bench, no defects noted. Checked aileron control cable tension, found control cable tension to low. Adjusted aileron control cable tension to spec IAW Piper AMM 27-00-00 and resafetied turn buckles, checked travel and found to be within limits IAW 27-00-00. Cleaned control yokes. Visually inspected Tee Bar assembly, control column chains, gears and knuckles for pilot and co pilot control yokes, no defects noted. Still could not duplicate after work performed.
